name: portfolio-pedro-braga
description: > **Full Stack Developer & Infraestrutura** | E-commerce, Automações em Python e Servidores

scripts.minify:js: terser js/analytics.js -c -m --comments false -o js/analytics.min.js && terser js/content-loader.js -c -m --comments false -o js/content-loader.min.js && terser js/i18n.js -c -m --comments false -o js/i18n.min.js && terser js/main.js -c -m --comments false -o js/main.min.js && terser js/year.js -c -m --comments false -o js/year.min.js
scripts.build:minify: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
scripts.build: npm run build:blog && npm run build:minify
